name: turd-box
description: Ship safer code with fewer context switches. Multi-agent orchestration, 6-pass adversarial review, AISLE security posture, persistent-memory support, and a live HUD — the production layer for Claude Code.

plugins.name: 4ge
plugins.description: Agentic OS for Claude Code. 40 commands, 40 skills, 9 OS capabilities. /forge dispatches specialized agents across a 7-phase build pipeline. /dfe runs 6-pass adversarial code review (5 domain passes + 1 adversarial pass). /aisle reports security posture and routes scans while the old fail-closed gate remains shelved. /recall searches connected cross-session memory. /hud renders live OS state in the statusline. One install, one config.
